description: ERP Multi-Empresa — Sistema web para gerenciar ecossistema de 8+ empresas com multi-tenancy, fluxo Boleto-Proposta, CRM, SAC, Financeiro e Fiscal

userStories.title: Scaffold Next.js project with base dependencies
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the project scaffolded with all base tooling so that development can begin.
acceptanceCriteria: Next.js 14 app created with TypeScript and App Router
TailwindCSS configured and working
Shadcn/UI initialized with base components (Button, Input, Card, Table, Dialog, Toast)
Prisma configured with PostgreSQL connection string in .env
Base folder structure: src/app, src/lib, src/components, prisma/
Dev server starts without errors
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create base Prisma schema for auth and multi-tenancy
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema for companies, users, roles, and audit logs so that the foundation layer is ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Company model: id, razaoSocial, nomeFantasia, cnpj (unique), inscricaoEstadual, endereco, telefone, email, segmento, logoUrl, status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE), createdAt, updatedAt
User model: id, name, email (unique), passwordHash, role (ADMIN/MANAGER), status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE), createdAt, updatedAt
UserCompany junction model: userId, companyId, modules (array of allowed modules)
AuditLog model: id, userId, action, entity, entityId, dataBefore (JSON), dataAfter (JSON), ipAddress, companyId, createdAt
Migration generated and applied successfully
Seed script creates 2 sample companies and 1 admin user
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement JWT authentication utilities and middleware
userStories.description: As a developer, I need JWT token generation, validation, and route protection so that the app has secure authentication.
acceptanceCriteria: JWT access token generation with 15min expiry
Refresh token generation with 7d expiry stored in httpOnly cookie
Password hashing with bcrypt
Auth middleware that validates JWT on protected API routes
Helper function to get current user from token
Token refresh endpoint that issues new access token
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create login page UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to log in with email and password so that I can access the system securely.
acceptanceCriteria: Login page at /login with email and password fields
Client-side validation (required fields, email format)
API route POST /api/auth/login that validates credentials and returns JWT
Error message shown for invalid credentials
Successful login redirects to /dashboard
Unauthenticated users redirected to /login
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create base app layout with sidebar and header
userStories.description: As a user, I want a consistent layout with sidebar navigation and header so I can navigate the system.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar with navigation links: Dashboard, Comercial, SAC, Financeiro, Fiscal, Configurações
Sidebar is fixed and collapsible
Header shows current user name and placeholder for company selector
Layout wraps all authenticated pages under /(app) route group
Responsive: sidebar collapses to hamburger on mobile
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create company CRUD server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need server actions for company management so that the UI can create and manage companies.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action: createCompany with all company fields
Server action: updateCompany
Server action: listCompanies with pagination and search
Server action: getCompanyById
Server action: toggleCompanyStatus (active/inactive)
CNPJ validation (format: XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX and uniqueness check)
Only ADMIN role can create/edit companies
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create company registration and listing page
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want to register new companies and see all companies so I can manage the ecosystem.
acceptanceCriteria: Company listing page at /configuracoes/empresas with table (name, CNPJ, status, actions)
Search by name or CNPJ
Create company form in dialog/modal with all fields
Edit company form pre-populated with existing data
CNPJ field with input mask and inline validation
Active/inactive toggle per company
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create company selector component in header
userStories.description: As a user with access to multiple companies, I want to switch between companies so I see only that company's data.
acceptanceCriteria: Dropdown in header showing companies the user has access to
Selecting a company updates a React context/store used by all pages
Last selected company persisted in localStorage and restored on next session
Admin users see all active companies
Manager users see only their assigned companies
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement role-based access control
userStories.description: As a developer, I need permission-checking utilities so that users only access authorized data and modules.
acceptanceCriteria: Helper: canAccessCompany(userId, companyId) checks UserCompany junction
Helper: canAccessModule(userId, companyId, module) checks module permissions
Middleware: rejectUnauthorized for server actions that checks company access
Admin role bypasses company-level checks (sees all)
Manager role restricted to assigned companies and modules
All existing server actions updated to use permission checks
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create user management server actions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need server actions for user CRUD so the admin can manage users.
acceptanceCriteria: Server action: createUser (name, email, password, role)
Server action: updateUser
Server action: listUsers with pagination and search
Server action: assignUserToCompanies (set which companies and modules)
Server action: toggleUserStatus (active/inactive)
Only ADMIN can manage users
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create user management page
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want to create users and assign them to companies and modules.
acceptanceCriteria: User listing page at /configuracoes/usuarios with table (name, email, role, status)
Search by name or email
Create user form: name, email, password, role (Admin/Manager)
Company assignment: multi-select of companies with module checkboxes per company
Edit user form with existing data pre-populated

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Implement audit logging service
userStories.description: As an administrator, I need all user actions logged for traceability and security.
acceptanceCriteria: Utility function: logAuditEvent(userId, action, entity, entityId, dataBefore, dataAfter, ipAddress, companyId)
Audit log calls added to all existing server actions (company CRUD, user CRUD, login, logout)
Logs are insert-only — no update or delete endpoints exist
Action types: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, LOGIN, LOGOUT, STATUS_CHANGE
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create audit log viewer page
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want to view and export audit logs to monitor system activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log page at /configuracoes/auditoria with paginated table
Columns: timestamp, user, action, entity, company
Filters: user, action type, date range, company, entity type
Chronological ordering (most recent first)
CSV export button that downloads filtered results
Only ADMIN role can access this page

Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Create consolidated dashboard with KPIs
userStories.description: As an administrator, I want a dashboard with key performance indicators across all companies.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page at /dashboard as the main landing page
KPI cards: total revenue, total expenses, total profit (placeholder data for now)
Per-company breakdown table showing each company's metrics
Period filter: day, week, month, year, custom date range

userStories.description: As an administrator, I want visual charts comparing company performance.
acceptanceCriteria: Bar or line chart comparing revenue across companies

Use a chart library (recharts or chart.js)

userStories.title: Implement password recovery flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want to recover my password via email so I can regain access if I forget it.
acceptanceCriteria: Forgot password page at /forgot-password with email input
Generic email sending interface: sendEmail(to, subject, htmlBody, attachments) abstracted behind a provider interface
Password reset token generated and stored with expiry (1 hour)

Token validated and password updated on submission
Session expiry after 30 minutes of inactivity

userStories.title: Create financial database schema
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the financial tables so that the financial module can be built.
acceptanceCriteria: Client model: id, name, razaoSocial, cpfCnpj (unique per tenant), email, telefone, endereco, type (PF/PJ), companyId, createdAt, updatedAt
FinancialCategory model: id, name, type (INCOME/EXPENSE), companyId
AccountReceivable model: id, clientId, description, value, dueDate, status (PENDING/PAID/OVERDUE), paidAt, companyId, createdAt
AccountPayable model: id, supplier, description, value, dueDate, status (PENDING/PAID/OVERDUE), categoryId, recurrence (NONE/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/YEARLY), paidAt, companyId, createdAt
Migration generated and applied successfully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Client table is created here as it is needed for receivables. Full CRM features are built in Phase 4.

Listing page at /financeiro/receber with table: client, description, value, due date, status
Filters: status (pending/paid/overdue), date range, client
Status badge colors: gray=pending, green=paid, red=overdue
Manual write-off button that marks as paid with current date
Scoped to selected company (tenant)
